title: BEM-866 commit contour diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if wf.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'codex_runner_exists': wf.exists(),
    'has_commit_step': 'Commit and push everything' in text,
    'has_git_commit': 'git commit' in text,
    'has_git_push': 'git push' in text,
    'has_commit_sha_write': 'commit_sha' in text,
    'has_actions_checkout': 'actions/checkout' in text,
    'has_ai_pat': 'AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT' in text,
}
status = 'COMMIT_STEP_PRESENT' if checks['has_commit_step'] and checks['has_git_commit'] and checks['has_git_push'] else 'COMMIT_STEP_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_COMMIT_CONTOUR_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 commit contour diag\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('commit contour diag: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
